# Rangel Janitorial

> Professional janitorial and commercial cleaning services across California. Rangel Janitorial delivers reliable, thorough cleaning for offices, medical facilities, industrial parks, fitness centers, and multi-unit complexes. Serving Sacramento, Murrieta, and Walnut Creek.

Rangel Janitorial has served California businesses for 30+ years with reliable commercial cleaning. We specialize in offices, medical facilities, industrial parks, fitness centers, Class A buildings, and multi-tenant complexes. Headquartered in Murrieta, CA, with regional teams serving Sacramento, the Inland Empire, and the East Bay.

## Key Facts

- **Company:** Rangel Janitorial
- **Website:** https://rangeljanitorial.com
- **Headquarters:** 26323 Jefferson Avenue, Murrieta, CA 92562
- **Founded:** 30+ years ago (family-operated)
- **Email:** ralph@rangeljanitorial.com
- **Phones:** Sacramento (916) 426-2311 · Murrieta (951) 331-3300 · Walnut Creek (925) 655-9008
- **Service area:** California — Sacramento, Inland Empire, East Bay
- **Business hours:** Mon-Fri 7am-6pm, Sat 8am-4pm
- **Certifications:** Licensed, bonded, insured; OSHA-trained crews

## Services

- [Janitorial Cleaning — nightly commercial cleaning for offices and facilities](https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/janitorial-cleaning) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/janitorial-cleaning
- [Day Porter Services — on-site cleaning during business hours](https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/day-porter) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/day-porter
- [Electrostatic Disinfection — hospital-grade pathogen control](https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/electrostatic-disinfection) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/electrostatic-disinfection
- [Floor Care — VCT strip & wax, burnishing, polish, hard-surface maintenance](https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/floor-care) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/floor-care
- [Carpet Cleaning — commercial hot water extraction and stain treatment](https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/carpet-cleaning) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/services/carpet-cleaning

## Service Locations

- [Sacramento — Greater Sacramento, Elk Grove, Roseville, Folsom, Rancho Cordova](https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/sacramento) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/sacramento
- [Murrieta — Inland Empire, Temecula, Menifee, Lake Elsinore, Hemet, Corona](https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/murrieta) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/murrieta
- [Walnut Creek — East Bay, Concord, Pleasant Hill, Danville, San Ramon, Livermore](https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/walnut-creek) — https://rangeljanitorial.com/locations/walnut-creek

## Blog — Cleaning Guides & Industry Insights

- [Office Cleaning Best Practices for a Healthier Workplace](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/office-cleaning-best-practices.md): Essential office cleaning practices that promote employee health, productivity, and professional impressions. Learn what top janitorial companies focus on.
- [Janitorial Services in Sacramento: What to Look For](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/janitorial-services-sacramento.md): A guide for Sacramento businesses seeking reliable janitorial services. What to expect, key questions to ask, and how to evaluate commercial cleaning companies.
- [Commercial Cleaning in Murrieta & the Inland Empire](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/commercial-cleaning-murrieta.md): Why Inland Empire businesses trust Rangel Janitorial for their commercial cleaning needs. Services, reliability, and what sets us apart in Murrieta and Temecula.
- [The Benefits of Day Porter Services for Your Facility](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/day-porter-benefits.md): How day porter services keep your facility looking its best throughout the business day. Real-time cleaning, restroom maintenance, and common area upkeep.
- [Electrostatic Disinfection Explained: How It Works](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/electrostatic-disinfection-explained.md): Understanding electrostatic disinfection technology — how it works, why it provides superior coverage, and when your facility needs it.
- [Floor Care 101: VCT Strip and Wax Guide](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/floor-care-vct-strip-wax.md): Everything you need to know about VCT floor care — strip and wax schedules, maintenance tips, and why professional floor care extends the life of your flooring.
- [Medical Facility Cleaning Standards You Should Know](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/medical-facility-cleaning-standards.md): Cleaning standards and best practices for medical and dental facilities. Infection control, compliance requirements, and what to expect from your janitorial provider.
- [Fitness Center Cleaning: A Complete Guide](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/fitness-center-cleaning-guide.md): How to maintain a clean, hygienic fitness center. Equipment sanitization, locker room care, and the cleaning schedule your gym needs.
- [How to Choose the Right Commercial Cleaning Company](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/choosing-commercial-cleaning-company.md): Key factors to consider when selecting a commercial cleaning company. Insurance, references, scope of services, and red flags to watch for.
- [Carpet Cleaning for Commercial Buildings: What You Need to Know](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/carpet-cleaning-commercial-buildings.md): Professional carpet cleaning extends carpet life and improves indoor air quality. Learn about methods, frequency, and what commercial carpet cleaning includes.
- [Green Cleaning for Commercial Facilities](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/green-cleaning-commercial-facilities.md): How environmentally responsible cleaning practices benefit your facility, employees, and the planet. Green products, sustainable methods, and certifications to look for.
- [Janitorial Services in Walnut Creek & the East Bay](https://rangeljanitorial.com/blog/janitorial-services-walnut-creek.md): Professional janitorial services for Walnut Creek, Concord, Pleasant Hill, and the greater East Bay. What Bay Area businesses should expect from their cleaning provider.

## Facility Types Served

- Class A office buildings and corporate campuses
- Medical and dental facilities (OSHA, HIPAA-aware protocols)
- Industrial parks and light manufacturing
- Fitness centers and gyms
- Multi-tenant complexes and HOAs
- Municipalities and public facilities
- Retail spaces and showrooms

## Cleaning Specialties

- Nightly janitorial (5x, 3x, 2x weekly schedules)
- Day porter and lobby ambassador programs
- Electrostatic disinfection and infection control
- VCT strip & wax, floor burnishing, hard-surface restoration
- Commercial carpet extraction and spot treatment
- Green cleaning with EPA Safer Choice products
- Post-construction and one-time deep cleans

## Why Businesses Choose Rangel Janitorial

- 30+ years of commercial cleaning experience across California
- Family-operated with consistent, trained crews (low turnover)
- Customized cleaning plans — no one-size-fits-all contracts
- Local account managers in each service region
- Fully licensed, bonded, and insured
- Green cleaning products and sustainable practices available
- Reliable communication and quality-control walkthroughs
